name: Coniglio Alla Cassia
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the rabbit into 6 pieces.
2. Wash and dry the rabbit well.
3. Chop the liver into very small pieces.
4. Combine olive oil, butter, and salt pork in a saucepan; heat.
5. Add onions and cook until medium brown.
6. Add rabbit pieces and brown for 10 minutes.
7. Add garlic, bay leaves, black pepper, and chopped liver. Stir and cook for 10 minutes.
8. Add wine, stir, cover, and cook for 5 minutes.
9. Uncover and add the tomato and hot water, stirring until the mixture is well combined.
10. Cook slowly for about 1 hour. Test for doneness; do not overcook. Carefully taste for salt (optional) if needed and adjust at this point.
11. When the rabbit is cooked, cover and keep warm until serving time.
12. Spoon the sauce over both rabbit and pasta.
SOURCE: Leone's Italian Cookbook
